description: Take semi-formal dressing to the next level with these slip-on leather shoes from provogue. With comfort and style rolled into one, these shoes work great for people who love to take off and wear their shoes with ease. Team this with jeans or cargoes and t-shirts for that smart look.Upper Full grain leather upper for maximum durability, breathability and style Slip-on system for easy wear and removal Elastic inserts on the sides of the tongue for a snug, customised Fit Perforations on the midfoot region for added breathability Leather overlay over the tongue for midfoot support Mock buckle across the tongue for style Stitch detailing to enhance shoe life Padded rounded collar with a leather inner for sweat-free comfort Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Leather inner lining for maximum breathability Padded fabric footbed for all-day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Outsole Durable rubber outsole ergonomically designed to offer maximum comfort Textured on the forefoot, heel, and medial and lateral midfoot, with multi-directional lugs throughout for maximum grip and traction Scooped mid-heel for absolute shock absorption to protect the heel from impact Curved midfoot and mildly high heel for ergonomic comfort Shoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
